suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document that features with skillName 'rust-worker' should use the skill at '.factory/skills/worker/SKILL.md' instead. Workers should verify skill paths before invocation to avoid confusion.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: All 5 LLM milestone features (llm-anthropic-backend, llm-openai-backend, llm-mock-backend, llm-model-router, llm-health-check) specified skillName 'rust-worker' but this skill doesn't exist. Workers encountered errors and proceeded without the skill.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Rename the skill from 'worker' to 'rust-worker' or update features.json to use 'worker' instead of 'rust-worker' for consistency. The mismatch causes confusion.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: features.json uses 'rust-worker' but actual skill is at '.factory/skills/worker/SKILL.md'
